text:
The following page is an overall list of all-time appearances in every media of the character Dante from the Fullmetal Alchemist franchise.

Television

Fullmetal Alchemist (2003 Anime)

Episodes (13/51)

Episode 32: Dante of the Deep Forest (Elderly form)
Episode 33: Al, Captured (Elderly form)
Episode 34: Theory of Avarice (as "Lyra")
Episode 40: The Scar (as "Lyra")
Episode 41: Holy Mother(as "Lyra")
Episode 42: His Name Is Unknown (as "Lyra")
Episode 44: Hohenheim of Light (as "Lyra" and "Dante")
Episode 45: A Rotted Heart (as "Dante" in Lyra's body) (as her original true form in a flashback)
Episode 46: Human Transmutation (as "Dante" in Lyra's body)
Episode 47: Sealing the Homunculus (Elderly form) (flashback)
Episode 49: The Other Side of the Gate (as "Dante" in Lyra's body)
Episode 50: Death (as "Dante" in Lyra's body)
Episode 51: Laws and Promises (as "Dante" in Lyra's body)

OVAs (1/4)

Chibi Party

Openings (1/5)

Rewrite

Fullmetal Alchemist (2009 Anime)

Episodes (1/64)

Episode 58: Sacrifices (cameo)

Video Games

Fullmetal Alchemist: Dual Sympathy
